inputs.name: W
inputs.desc: Weight matrix [M, K] in Q5_0 format

strategies.name: openmp_rows
strategies.notes: Quantizes input once serially, then uses #pragma omp parallel for over output rows

impl.c_declaration: void gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_parallel_omp(float *y, const void *W, const float *x, const float *bias, int M, int K);

notes: OpenMP-parallel version of gemv_fused_q5_0_bias_dispatch for single-stream decode throughput. Quantizes input once, then parallelizes GEMV + bias over output rows.
